debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
s : Set ℝ
hs : MeasurableSet s
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in s, exp x * f (exp x) = ∫ (y : ℝ) in exp '' s, f y

failed_attempts:
rw [← integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_exp x).hasDerivWithinAt)
    (exp_injective.injOn s) continuous_exp.continuousOn]
  congr with x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x)]

rw [integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_exp x).hasDerivWithinAt) (exp_injective.injOn s)]
  apply set_integral_congr hs
  intro x _
  rw [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x), smul_eq_mul]

rw [integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs _ _ _]
  · simp_rw [abs_exp, smul_eq_mul]
  · exact fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_exp x).hasDerivWithinAt
  · exact exp_injective.injOn s
  · exact continuous_exp.continuousOn

rw [integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul s hs (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_exp x).hasDerivWithinAt)
    (exp_injective.injOn s) continuous_exp.continuousOn]
  congr with x
  simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x)]

rw [integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul hs (exp_injective.injOn _)
    (fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_exp x).hasDerivWithinAt) continuous_exp.continuousOn]
  congr; ext x; simp [abs_of_pos (exp_pos x)]

rw [integral_image_eq_integral_abs_deriv_smul openEmbedding_exp.measurableEmbedding]
  · congr with x
    simp only [Real.abs_exp, ContinuousLinearMap.det_smul_right, FiniteDimensional.finrank_self, pow_one]
  · exact fun x _ ↦ (hasDerivAt_exp x).hasFDerivAt.hasFDerivWithinAt

  · exact continuous_exp.continuousOn
